title: MundoMagis: Arcane
body:
MundoMagis: Arcane is continuation of [MundoMagis: Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/mundomagis).

Mod adds:
- Magic Wand
- Special ArcaneAPI for devs, who want to create an addon.
- Some spells, which can help you in mine, fight

With your spells, you can become the strongest wizard and fight with other players.


<details>
<summary>Requirements</summary>
  
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
  
- [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
</details>



Can you get all spells? Start this challenge now with MundoMagis!
